case_title: URBAN PACIFIC PROPERTIES, INC. VS. ARMANDO J. CORTES ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URBAN PACIFIC PROPERTIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTES, ARMANDO J.
